name: Tex-Mex Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon tomatoes over pizza dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
2. Top with jalapenos, garlic and onion.
3. Sprinkle with cheeses and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Bake in a 500 degree oven for 10 to 14 minutes until the bottom of the crust is golden brown.
5. Top with avocado, a dollop of sour cream and parsley. Pass extra sour cream.
